title: Shopify Polaris React Accessibility
summary: Shopify's Polaris React accessibility foundation for inclusive commerce interfaces and component use.
lessons: Make accessible structure, interaction, and content part of every component decision.
caveats: The Polaris documentation surface is migrating; verify the canonical Shopify platform before implementation.
licenseNote: Public first-party documentation; cite and synthesize.
antiImitationNote: Transfer accessibility discipline, not Shopify branding or commerce-specific language.
